title: aspidium globuliferum
intro: Aspidium globuliferum, also known as the Rigid Shield Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. In herbal preparations, Aspidium globuliferum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
